title: mysqldump and SHOW CREATE VIEW produce invalid syntax for VIEWs with ROLL UP
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE tmp_table_rollup (id bigint(20) NOT NULL, groupKey varchar(250) DEFAULT NULL, groupValue varchar(250) DEFAULT NULL, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, PRIMARY KEY (id));
INSERT INTO tmp_table_rollup (groupKey, groupValue) VALUES ('A', 'Value1'), ('B', 'Value2'), (NULL, 'Value3'), ('C', NULL);
CREATE VIEW tmp_view_rollup AS SELECT groupKey, COUNT(id) AS groupCount FROM tmp_table_rollup GROUP BY groupKey;
key_bug_features: SHOW CREATE VIEW with ROLL UP produces invalid syntax
